section_miscategorizations.text: An EKG is ordered to evaluate for possible cardiac issues.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is a diagnostic test order (management step), not an exam or test result, so it belongs in the Plan rather than Findings.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient reports intermittent chest pain.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is a patient-reported symptom and duplicates HPI content; while not misleading, it is more appropriate in the History of Present Illness than in Findings.
